features.description: Team catalogue + roster management. On for every tier by default.
Probationary tryout workflow — schedule, evaluate, convert to member.
Register teams to events, track attendance, record results. Fully wired in Wave 3 when the Sports Event module lands.
Refuse roster-add when team is at capacity. Off means capacity is a UI hint only.
Allow member_type='coach' on TeamMember. Wave 2b unlocks once Staff module lands with the Coach model.
Assign jersey_number to team members with uniqueness check per team. Off means jersey_number is unused.
Free-form weekly practice schedule per team. Feeds Wave 3 Sports session-scheduling. Off = simple weekly-cadence text field.
SDUI surface for editing team primary/secondary colours + logo. When off, teams use tenant-wide branding.
